LanguageData.ABY_CraftInfernalCombatFrame.label: forge infernal combat frame
LanguageData.ABY_CraftInfernalCombatFrame.description: Assemble a disciplined abyssal torso frame from residue-lined plating, reinforced plasteel ribs, and a sealed chest-core lattice. Heavier than the rift helm, but still cut for active combat instead of ceremonial bulk.
